name: Buttermilk Dressing with Herbs & Green Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together buttermilk, olive oil, lemon juice, and mayonnaise in a small bowl until the mixture is smooth and well blended.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (garlic chives, tarragon, green peppercorns, salt, and sugar) to the bowl and stir until combined.
3. Cover the bowl tightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Correct seasoning as needed and allow the dressing to come to room temperature before serving.
Yield: About 1 1/2 cups dressing.
